name: Synup vs Birdeye: Which One Goes Beyond Reputation Management?
hero_main_title: Paying for a complex ORM solution, most of which you don’t end up using? There’s a better way!
hero_summary: Birdeye is built for review collection. Synup is built for agencies and multi-location brands that need to deliver the full local marketing stack. From listings and reputation to SEO, social, and client management, Synup gives you the tools to run and scale your agency without stitching multiple platforms together.
counter_text_1: say they effortlessly increased store visits
counter_text_2: of businesses increased their online conversions year-over-year
counter_text_3: businesses seamlessly listed across key online platforms
section_2_heading: Why Agencies Choose Synup Over Birdeye
section_2_summary: Birdeye is a solid pick for review management, but Synup goes further by helping agencies manage the entire client lifecycle. From prospecting and onboarding to running listings, SEO, social, and reputation campaigns, Synup gives you one connected platform to deliver, track, and report on everything at scale. Instead of using multiple tools for different stages of the journey, Synup lets you find new opportunities, streamline workflows, monitor client health, and showcase results while keeping your agency’s brand in front.
section_2_slider_1_heading: Built for the Whole Agency Workflow
section_2_slider_1_summary: Synup gives you a single dashboard to manage listings, reputation, SEO, social, and client health across all your clients or locations. Automate routine tasks, onboard new businesses quickly, and deliver a fully branded experience without using multiple tools.
section_2_slider_2_summary: Synup lets you showcase your agency brand across every client touchpoint. Add your own branding, include social apps in your dashboard, and share reports and client portals that reflect your agency, not the platform. This keeps your agency front and center while providing a seamless experience for clients.
section_2_step_3_summary: While Birdeye focuses heavily on reviews, Synup helps you both generate and manage them, plus everything that drives those reviews in the first place. From accurate listings to visibility tools, Synup gives you the full stack.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Sync your business info across 60+ directories, track keyword rankings, optimize for voice search, and get actionable local SEO insights. Birdeye doesn’t touch these areas, while Synup makes them part of your core delivery.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
why_choose_tab_desc_1: With Synup, you can find and qualify new clients using Prospect Search and run in-depth audits in minutes. See exactly where their listings, reputation, SEO, and social presence need improvement, and pitch solutions with confidence. Birdeye focuses primarily on reviews, leaving these opportunities untapped.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: Synup lets you manage every stage of the client lifecycle from one dashboard. Onboard new clients, track campaigns, automate tasks across listings, SEO, reviews, and social, and monitor client health with actionable insights. Birdeye does not provide this level of workflow control.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: Run your agency without juggling multiple tools. Synup combines listings, local SEO, social publishing, review management, and white-labeled reporting in a single platform. This means faster execution, complete visibility, and a seamless branded experience for your clients, something Birdeye cannot match.
why_choose_content_title: Synup: The Vanguard of Digital Solutions
why_choose_content_summary: Embrace the Future with Synup – Where Innovation Drives Engagement.
testimonial_summary: Boost your online presence effortlessly with Synup's Local Listings Management. List, optimize, and monitor profiles on Google, Facebook, Yelp, and premium partner sites. Ensure consistency across search, local, voice, and social platforms. Access detailed analytics for informed decision-making. Take charge of your brand image by controlling displayed information. Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.
